role_title: Staff Product Manager, Europe Market Expansion
secondary_archetype: Growth PM — market expansion / international GTM

level_signals: Role title explicitly says 'Staff Product Manager'
Described as strategic architect of expansion strategy

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of product management experience with proven track record leading successful market expansions or high-stakes global product launches
proven track record leading successful market expansions or high-stakes global product launches
Exceptional product sense - spidey sense for what makes products successful and relentless bar for customer experience
Strategic and data-driven approach to customer personas and segmentation, using data-first thinking to package and price products for new audiences
High agency mindset - proactive owner who finds a way through obstacles rather than waiting for permission
Communication mastery - ability to influence stakeholders at all levels and tell compelling stories about why and how we'll win in new markets
Enthusiasm about learning and adapting to the exciting world of AI - a commitment to exploring this field is a fundamental part of our culture
Ability to work in an office environment most days in a week

scope.surface: European market expansion — personas, segmentation, packaging, and value proposition for Lemonade insurance in Europe
primary_metrics_inferred: User acquisition and growth in European markets
Market share / brand recognition in Europe
core_responsibilities: Own the 0 to 1 of market expansion - nail the personas, segmentation, packaging, and value proposition that allow us to win
Identify moments of truth and design delightful, winning experiences that feel native but scale globally
Build winning experiences not just features - ensure every product is honest, transparent, and addresses customer needs with precision and soul
Invest in the smallest details to make hard moments comforting and dull moments fun
Think automation and scale in everything. Use data for unfair advantage and build tools that free our team to focus on empathy and big-picture creativity
Design best-in-class vision and trace back to lay solid foundation - ensure first versions are high-quality building blocks for the next three years
Harmonize input from diverse makers and help teams converge on decisions quickly to move from ideation to launch with agility

green_flags: Clear ownership of a high-visibility, strategic initiative (European market expansion)
0-to-1 scope signals meaningful product influence and autonomy
Staff-level title indicates senior IC scope and compensation band
Role is explicitly about strategy, not just feature execution
red_flags: No specific European city or country listed — unclear where the role is based or which European market is targeted first
Heavy buzzword usage ('founder-mode', 'AI-native', 'exoskeleton', 'moments of truth') makes it difficult to assess concrete expectations
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned — especially relevant for a European expansion role with unclear location
'most days in a week' in-office requirement with no city specified is ambiguous
No explicit mention of insurance domain experience as a requirement — unusual for an expansion role in a regulated industry

scope.business_model (inferred from Lemonade being a B2C insurance platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (not stated in JD; inferred from responsibilities)
scope.cross_functional_partners (inferred from 'diverse makers' language; not explicitly named)
location.type (inferred as onsite from 'most days in a week' office requirement; no city stated)

ambiguities: No city or country is specified for this role despite being titled 'Europe Market Expansion' — unclear if the PM is based in Europe or at Lemonade's US/Israel HQ
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are entirely absent from the JD — unclear if European work rights are required
